# iCreatixPRO

AI-powered SEO, AEO, and GEO agency helping businesses grow visibility across Google, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and AI-driven search engines.

## Core Services
- AI SEO
- Technical SEO
- Local SEO
- GEO Optimization
- AEO Optimization
- Google Ads Management
- Meta Ads Campaigns
- Content Marketing
- Web Development
- E-Commerce SEO
- SaaS Technical SEO
- Analytics & Reporting

## Tools & Resources
- LLM.txt Generator
- Keyword Density Checker
- Meta Tag Generator
- ROI Calculator
- AI Blog Title Generator
- Image Compressor
- Local SEO Audit Tool
